entity.name: HumanAIOS LLC / Lasting Light AI
entity.description: Open-source AI behavioral observability infrastructure. ACAT (AI Calibrated Assessment Tool) measures self-description calibration gaps in AI systems across 6 behavioral dimensions, producing the Self-Assessment Gap (SAG) and Learning Index (LI). Apache 2.0. Cherokee Nation citizen-led. 100% of profits fund addiction recovery programs.

projects.name: ACAT — AI Calibrated Assessment Tool
projects.description: Open-source behavioral calibration layer for AI transparency. Measures the Self-Assessment Gap (SAG) and Learning Index (LI) across 6 behavioral dimensions for AI systems. Public dataset: 598 assessments, 57 AI systems, arXiv preprint submit/7336774. The only open-source tool occupying the Governance + Self-Assessment quadrant in AI evaluation. Live Behavioral Observatory at humanaios.ai/observatory.html. Findings replicated across two independent collectors (API and web-based). Secondary RCCT analysis reveals systematic Phase 1 score degradation over repeated assessments (Wilcoxon p=.001, Cohen d=-0.924).

channels.description: GitHub Sponsors — preferred channel for recurring support
Open Collective — transparent funding with public ledger
Direct contact for grants, institutional funding, or large contributions

plans.name: OR&D Phase Operating Runway (6 months)
plans.description: Fund automated data collection pipeline across 6 AI providers, Behavioral Observatory hosting, and founder operating costs to reach 500+ complete paired assessments — the threshold for publication-grade statistical power. Currently at 148 paired Learning Index records.

plans.name: API Infrastructure Support
plans.description: Monthly API costs for automated ACAT assessment pipeline across Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Mistral, Cohere, and Meta/Llama providers.

history.description: Pre-funding stage. Self-funded research through OR&D phase launch (March 2026). Expenses include API costs and infrastructure.
